functions.name: uo_puddles.mlops.up_no_globals
documentation: use: @up_no_globals(globals())  #globals is function that returns *current* globals as dict
DANGER DANGER: this fails on forward refs. Assumes helper functions all defined before main function. If not will get spurious error.

classes.name: uo_puddles.mlops.CustomMappingTransformer
documentation: This class maps values in a column, numeric or categorical.
Importantly, it does not change NaNs, leaving that for the imputer step.
